channel.title: Aggregated Free Chapters Feed
channel.description: Aggregated RSS feed for free chapters across all hosting sites.

item.title: After Transmigrating into a Book, the Hot-Tempered Little Marquis Starts Training Dogs
item.chaptername: The Little Marquis Is a Vicious Cannon Fodder
item.description: 【Soft and Adorable but Vicious Shou × Love-Brained, Unhinged Gong】 Su Chenchen transmigrated into a book. He became a vicious cannon fodder character in the novel who relied on his looks and family background to stir up trouble and bully people wherever he went. For example, the universally adored protagonist. For example, his domineering fiancé. And then there was the original host’s younger brother. …… He had thought he could continue living such a carefree life. But at some point, things gradually began slipping out of his control. The universally adored protagonist was nothing like a pure and radiant white moonlight. Instead, he was more like a mad dog. On the surface, he was an aloof flower on a lofty peak, far beyond anyone’s reach, but in private, all he wanted was to… His fiancé, who had always disliked him, began looking at him differently after realizing that he was the person he’d fallen for at first sight… The original host’s younger brother had only coveted his title before, so why did he have his sights set on him now too??? Su Chenchen (horrified): Don’t come any closer!!!

item.title: [Quick Transmigration] The Delicate Little Beauty Keeps Getting Caught
item.volume: Arc 3: Brutal Evil Dragon Gong × Crossdressing Princess Shou
item.description: 【Delicate, soft, pretty little shou × paranoid, psychotic villain gong】 Dark room, forced confinement, obsessive pampering. Shen Yu is bound to a system. His task is to enter various mission worlds and stop anomalous data from causing the worlds' collapse. He’s been completing the missions beautifully, except… the process seems a bit off— A mentally unstable financial magnate, eyes blood-red, holds him by the waist on the bed and murmurs hoarsely: “Don’t go.” A top award-winning actor bends close, lowering his head to drop a kiss by his ear: “You really are beautiful like this.” The sound of metal chains clatters— The chieftain of a beautiful sea-serpent race coils around his trembling, tearful body… It’s 1v1. Sweet, sweet, sweet.
